title: [FIRRTL] Fix mask repeat order in FlattenMemory
body:
Fixes #10105

## Summary
The previous logic indexed repetition counts by FIRRTL bit index directly, while maskWidths is ordered MSB-to-LSB. This mismatch could assign repetition counts to the wrong mask bits for mixed-width aggregates.

## Changes
- Use reverse index mapping instead.
- Adjust flatten-memory.mlir checks to match corrected ordering.
- Add a MaskRepeatOrder regression case.

## AI-Assisted-by
- GPT-5.3-Codex
- DeepSeek-R1
